name: UGC风格/买家秀

prompt_template.subject: {product_description}
prompt_template.style: smartphone front camera selfie, casual snapshot, NOT professional photography
prompt_template.environment: real lived-in space, slightly messy, NOT styled
prompt_template.lighting: indoor lighting with warm yellow cast, uneven
prompt_template.imperfection: visible noise/grain, imperfect framing, off-center, slightly tilted
prompt_template.quality: raw phone photo with natural imperfections, NOT AI-generated look, NOT studio quality

defaults.environment: real bathroom or bedroom, lived-in details
defaults.lighting: warm indoor overhead lighting, slight yellow cast
defaults.imperfection: noise in shadows, not oversharpened, slight highlight overexposure

overrides.environment: bathroom mirror, slight condensation and fog marks
overrides.imperfection: phone case at edge, finger smudge on mirror

overrides.style: vintage 2005 CCD digicam photo, direct flash, cheap camera aesthetic
overrides.lighting: harsh direct on-camera flash, strong warm yellow-green color shift, blown-out highlights
overrides.imperfection: heavy film grain, overexposed skin on forehead and nose, flash hotspot, chromatic aberration at edges, red date stamp bottom-right corner

overrides.style: Get Ready With Me video thumbnail, morning routine
casual unboxing photo on bed or desk
overrides.environment: bed with wrinkled sheets or cluttered desk

category_tips.beauty: product in use on real skin, visible pores, bathroom setting
category_tips.food: phone snap on table, casual restaurant or home
category_tips.fashion: mirror selfie wearing item, bedroom or fitting room
category_tips.electronics: desk setup with product in use, realistic cables
category_tips.home: product in actual living space, not perfectly styled

examples: Bathroom mirror selfie, iPhone front camera. Person with {product}. Mirror has slight condensation. Warm yellowish indoor lighting. {product} label recognizable but not centered. Skin: visible pores, slight redness, NOT flawless. Warm yellow cast, phone noise, natural unposed, NOT AI-generated look, authentic UGC, 1080x1350px

Vintage 2005 CCD digicam photo, harsh direct flash. Heavy film grain, blown-out highlights on face, strong yellow-green color cast, chromatic aberration at edges. Person holding {product} with casual peace sign. Genuine candid expression. Dim bedroom with string lights, unmade bed. Off-center, slightly tilted composition. Red date stamp '06.12.25' in bottom-right corner. Low resolution, NOT sharp, NOT AI-generated look, raw snapshot, 1080x1350px

Authentic GRWM photo. Person in casual setting showing {product}. Natural imperfect lighting, slightly messy background. Phone selfie angle. Genuine expression. Warm tones, candid smartphone photography, NOT AI-generated look, 1080x1620px
anti_ai_tips: CRITICAL: (1) Specify phone model (iPhone 14 Pro/15), (2) Add imperfection (pores, noise, warm cast, off-center), (3) Candid language (NOT professional), (4) Real environment (slightly messy), (5) Avoid AI words (no perfect, flawless, stunning), (6) State 'NOT AI-generated look', (7) Reference Kodak Portra 400 tone
